Bash(# Test health check to see if RPCs work now
curl -s http://localhost:3001/api/health/test-services 2>&1 | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'{r[\\"service\\"]}: {r[\\"status\\"]} - {r[\\"message\\"][:60]} \({r.get\(\\"provider\\",\\"\\"\)}\)'\)  for r in d['results']]" 2>&1)

Bash(# Search for MON on Binance
curl -s 'https://api.binance.com/api/v3/exchangeInfo' 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
mon = [s['symbol'] for s in d['symbols'] if 'MON' in s['symbol'] and s['status']=='TRADING']
print\('\\n'.join\(sorted\(mon\)\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(# Search more broadly for monad
curl -s 'https://api.binance.com/api/v3/exchangeInfo' 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
mon = [s['symbol'] for s in d['symbols'] if 'MONAD' in s['symbol'].upper\(\) and s['status']=='TRADING']
print\('MONAD matches:', mon\)
mon2 = [s['symbol'] for s in d['symbols'] if s['symbol'].startswith\('MON'\) and s['status']=='TRADING']
print\('MON* matches:', mon2\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(# Try Blockscout API for Unichain top tokens
curl -s 'https://unichain.blockscout.com/api/v2/tokens?type=ERC-20&sort=circulating_market_cap&order=desc' 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import sys,json
try:
    d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
    items = d.get\('items', d\) if isinstance\(d, dict\) else d
    for t in items[:20]:
        print\(f\\"{t.get\('symbol','?'\):8s} {t.get\('address','?'\)} decimals={t.get\('decimals','?'\)} name={t.get\('name','?'\)}\\"\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f'Error: {e}'\)
" 2>/dev/null)
